chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Sale of Pasture, Crops, Trees, Lands, Servants, Water Rights, and Real Estate

parts.text: قَضَى رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ

text: اَلْعَرْضِ إِذَا كَانَتْ أَرْضاً رِخْوَةً أَنْ يَكُونَ بَيْنَهُمَا أَلْفُ ذِرَاعٍ وَ إِنْ كَانَتْ أَرْضاً صُلْبَةً يَكُونُ بَيْنَهُمَا خَمْسُمِائَةِ ذِرَاعٍ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.3871 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings be upon him and his family) ruled that the distance between two canals, if the land is soft, should be one thousand cubits, and if the land is hard, the distance should be five hundred cubits.
